title: Whisperer's Jungle Temple
description: Adds a new temple structure to the game, along with two new mobs
body:
This Mod adds a new temple structure to the jungle and 2 new jungle mobs, the whisperer and the jungle spider.

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f9e7f4543b6ddc16f7ca6f9d626001dcf3d08dc_0.webp)

**The major features include:**
- Structure to explore and loot
- a new mob: the Whisperer, custom item drop, it will also spawns in jungles.
- a new mob: the jungle spider
- New Leaf Sword

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c1cb292c7f57b72328a5f253cca84c9756585813_0.webp)
![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7b3c7ff46782dea8355b1b933c83c011e5834dc_0.webp)
